category_sources: Official Karakeep docs and repository describe Karakeep as a self-hostable app for bookmarks, notes, images, tagging, and search.
source_facts.description identifies Karakeep as a CLI for a self-hostable bookmark-everything app.
display_name_sources: Official Karakeep docs and repository use the product name Karakeep.
docs_sources: Official command-line docs cover the CLI packaged by Homebrew.
Official docs.karakeep.app is the dedicated documentation domain.
Official repository README is an additional official source.
repo_sources: Official Karakeep GitHub organization identifies karakeep-app/karakeep as the public repository for the app.
Official repository README describes the same self-hostable bookmark-everything app as source_facts.description.
tags_sources: Official docs and README mention links, notes, images, full-text search, and CLI support.
source_facts.description says self-hostable bookmark-everything app and CLI tool.
